caption: Two men sit in a room before a television, appearing to react to a video clip displayed in a small window. The man on the left wears a grey t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a similar grey t-shirt and has a tattoo on his upper arm. Behind them, a neon sign reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS", though parts of the letters are obscured by the men's heads. A shelf filled with DVDs and a black soundbar are visible in the background. The inset video features a man in historical attire on a horse. In the initial frames, the text "I, Zahir ud-Din Muhammad Babur," is visible at the bottom of the inset. As the scene progresses, the text changes to "have been cheating death since i was 14." The men's expressions shift from neutral to skeptical, with the man on the right eventually resting his chin on his hand.
